chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.D- 877 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on M.A- 4185 of 2020. 3. For hearing of main case. 29.09.2020 None present. = This petition is called for hearing. None present on behalf of the petitioner. No intimation received. It is noted that on the last date of hearing viz 27.08.2020, learned counsel for the petitioner was put on notice to satisfy the Court with regard to maintainability of this petition, but instead of it petitioner and his counsel have chosen to remain absent, which shows that either the purpose for which the instant petition was filed has been served or the petitioner has lost his interest in the same. Accordingly, the petition is dismissed in non-prosecution alongwith pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE S
